Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-16-2014 Continued To Jul-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory O'Keeffe for Merrill Lynch Trust Company.

Mr. O'Keeffe stated that he prepared the amendments to the Trust. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead. (Not Reported)
